name: io.github.quack2025/talk2data-insightgenius
title: Talk2Data InsightGenius
description: Analyze survey data (.sav, .csv, .xlsx) through Claude — crosstabs with significance testing, ANOVA, correlation, gap analysis, and publication-ready Excel exports. Upload once, analyze unlimited. Deterministic results: same data + same spec = same output, every time.

api_key.description: Your Talk2Data API key (sk_live_... or sk_test_...). Get one at https://spss.insightgenius.io
